title: MarketAccount
description: Comprehensive snapshot of an Exactly Protocol market and an account's positions within it, as returned by the Previewer contract's exactly() method.

symbol.description: ERC-20 symbol of the underlying asset (e.g., USDC, WETH)

asset.description: Address of the underlying ERC-20 asset

decimals.description: Decimal precision of the underlying asset

usdPrice.description: USD price of the underlying asset, scaled by 1e18

adjustFactor.description: Collateral adjust factor (LTV) for this market, scaled by 1e18. E.g., 8e17 = 80%.

maxFuturePools.description: Maximum number of concurrent active maturity pools

fixedPools.description: Active fixed-rate maturity pool summaries for this market

floatingBorrowRate.description: Current annualized variable borrow rate, scaled by 1e18

floatingDepositAPR.description: Current annualized variable deposit yield, scaled by 1e18

totalFloatingDepositAssets.description: Total assets deposited at variable rate in this market (in wei)

totalFloatingBorrowAssets.description: Total assets borrowed at variable rate from this market (in wei)

floatingDepositShares.description: Account's ERC-4626 deposit shares in this market

floatingDepositAssets.description: Account's variable deposit balance in underlying units (in wei)

floatingBorrowShares.description: Account's variable borrow shares in this market

floatingBorrowAssets.description: Account's variable borrow balance in underlying units (in wei)

isCollateral.description: Whether the account has enabled this market as collateral

fixedDepositPositions.description: Account's fixed-rate deposit positions across maturities

fixedBorrowPositions.description: Account's fixed-rate borrow positions across maturities

FixedPool.description: Summary of a fixed-rate maturity pool

maturity.description: Unix timestamp at which this pool matures

supplied.description: Total assets supplied to this maturity pool (in wei)

borrowed.description: Total assets borrowed from this maturity pool (in wei)

depositRate.description: Annualized fixed deposit APR for this pool, scaled by 1e18

minBorrowRate.description: Minimum fixed borrow APR for this pool, scaled by 1e18

optimalDeposit.description: Optimal deposit to maximize yield in this pool (in wei)

FixedPosition.description: A fixed-rate deposit or borrow position at a specific maturity

maturity.description: Unix timestamp of the maturity pool

position.description: Principal and fee components of the position

principal.description: Principal amount of the position (in wei)

fee.description: Fee (interest) component of the position (in wei)
